name: Cybereason
description: This app integrates with the Cybereason platform to perform investigative, contain, and corrective actions on Malop and Malware events

actions.name: On Poll
actions.description: Callback action for the on_poll ingest functionality

parameters.name: container_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of containers to ingest

parameters.name: container_id
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

parameters.name: artifact_count
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

actions.name: Delete Registry Key
actions.description: Deletes the specified registry key for a given malop ID and machine name

parameters.name: malop_id
parameters.description: The ID of the malop for deleting the registry key

parameters.name: machine_name
parameters.description: The name of the machine on which we want to delete the registry key

actions.name: Get Sensor Status
actions.description: Get the connectivity status for all machine sensors in a Malop

parameters.name: malop_id
parameters.description: The malop ID for which we will get sensor status information

actions.name: Add Malop Comment
actions.description: Add a comment to the provided Malop ID

parameters.name: malop_id
parameters.description: The malop ID for which we want to add a comment

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: The comment that we want to add to the malop

actions.name: Update Malop Status
actions.description: Update status for the provided Malop ID such as Under Investigation, To review, etc

parameters.name: malop_id
parameters.description: The malop ID for which we want to update the status

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The status that will be assigned to the malop

actions.name: Isolate Machine
actions.description: Blocks all communication to and from the machine. Communication with the Cybereason platform is not affected

parameters.name: malop_id
parameters.description: The malop ID for which we want to isolate the machine

actions.name: Unisolate Machine
actions.description: Unblocks all communication to and from the machine

parameters.name: malop_id
parameters.description: The malop ID for which we want to unisolate the machine

actions.name: Isolate Specific Machine
actions.description: Blocks all communication to and from the machine identified by the given Name or IP. Communication with the Cybereason platform is not affected

parameters.name: machine_name_or_ip
parameters.description: Name or IP of the machine that needs to be isolated

actions.name: Unisolate Specific Machine
actions.description: Unblocks all communication to and from the machine identified by the given Name or IP. Communication with the Cybereason platform is not affected

parameters.name: machine_name_or_ip
parameters.description: Name or IP of the machine that needs to be unisolated

actions.name: Kill Process
actions.description: Kills the active process on the machine

parameters.name: malop_id
parameters.description: The malop ID for which we want to kill the active process

parameters.name: remediation_user
parameters.description: The user-id who is killing the process

parameters.name: machine_id
parameters.description: Machine ID associated with that malop ID

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: Cybereason Process ID of the process to kill

actions.name: Get Remediation Status
actions.description: Gets the remediation status for a previously executed remediation action like Kill Process

parameters.name: malop_id
parameters.description: The malop ID for which we want to get the remediation status

parameters.name: remediation_user
parameters.description: The user ID that has requested the remediation action

parameters.name: remediation_id
parameters.description: An ID that specifies a previously executed remediation action like Kill Process

actions.name: Set Reputation
actions.description: Blacklists / Whitelists / Removes a file hash reputation so that future malop detections can quickly identify the hash

parameters.name: reputation_item_hash
parameters.description: The item (hash, IP) for which we want to set the reputation

parameters.name: custom_reputation
parameters.description: The custom reputation that we want to set for the reputation item

actions.name: Query Processes
actions.description: Queries a given malop to retrieve all processes

parameters.name: malop_id
parameters.description: The ID of the malop for which we want to get process details

actions.name: Query Machine
actions.description: Queries a given machine name to retrieve all that machine's information

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the machine

actions.name: Query Machine Ip
actions.description: Queries a given machine IP to retrieve all that machine's information

parameters.name: machine_ip
parameters.description: The IP of a machine

actions.name: Query Users
actions.description: Queries a given user to retrieve all user-related details

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The name of the user

actions.name: Query Files
actions.description: Queries a given filename to retrieve all file details

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: The name of the file

actions.name: Query Domain
actions.description: Queries a given domain name to retrieve all details of that domain

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: The name of the domain

actions.name: Query Connections
actions.description: Queries a given name to retrieve all details of that connection

parameters.name: connection_name
parameters.description: The name of the connection

actions.name: Upgrade Sensor
actions.description: Upgrade a sensor

parameters.name: pylumid
parameters.description: The Cybereason sensor pylum ID targeted for upgrade (comma-separated IDs allowed)

actions.name: Restart Sensor
actions.description: Restart a sensor

parameters.name: pylumid
parameters.description: The Cybereason sensor pylum ID targeted for restart (comma-separated IDs allowed)
